# elm-st-web
Canonical: https://elmst.ibaifernandez.com/

## Project
Corporate static website for Elm St. (audiovisual production company).

## Goals
- Netlify migration and hardening.
- High technical quality: SEO, accessibility, performance, security.
- No visual or editorial regressions in Spanish pages.

## Key Docs
- /README.md
- /PRD.md
- /ARCHITECTURE.md
- /ROADMAP.md
- /BACKLOG.md
- /CHANGELOG.md
- /I18N-STRATEGY.md

## Tech
- Static HTML/CSS/JS
- Netlify hosting + Netlify Forms
- Playwright (E2E, a11y, visual)
- Lighthouse CI

## Constraints
- Visual/copy freeze on existing Spanish site.
- Bilingual rollout (ES/EN) is additive.
